title: crotalaria anningensis
intro: Crotalaria anningensis is a species of flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae, native to Australia. It is a shrub or small tree that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory infections, among others. Crotalaria anningensis can be prepared as an infusion or decoction, or even used as a topical application in herbal preparations, although its use should be carefully evaluated due to potential toxicity.
